form.label: Splunk Data Lineage Overview
form.description: Force-directed graph of data flowing from Universal Forwarders through Heavy Forwarders to Indexers.

search.query: index=summary_lineage search_name="Generate Data Lineage Topology" | stats sum(events_per_sec) as events_per_sec max(loss_ratio) as loss_ratio by sourceNode, targetNode | rename sourceNode as source, targetNode as target | table source, target, events_per_sec, loss_ratio
| makeresults | eval Source="$drilldown_source$", Target="$drilldown_target$", EPS="$drilldown_eps$", "Loss Ratio"="$drilldown_loss$" | table Source, Target, EPS, "Loss Ratio"
